hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs apply internal compliance rules consistently across onboarding, monitoring, and case management to streamline reviews and maintain audit-ready decision trails.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance decisions depend on manual review
problem_description: Disparate provider outputs and manual interpretation slow down consistent application of compliance rules across onboarding, monitoring and case workflows. This creates delays, duplicated effort and weak traceability for VASP compliance teams managing complex digital asset requirements.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider checks with risk rules, review queues, case creation and decision logs to automate consistent compliance workflows for VASP operations while preserving audit-ready evidence and traceability.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY routes provider outputs through configured rules, review queues, case creation, decision logs and evidence preservation into consistent compliance outcomes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and audit evidence to help compliance teams consistently apply rules and manage operational review efficiently.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations with controlled provider orchestration, evidence preservation and enterprise deployment to support audit-ready, consistent compliance workflows from onboarding to review.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support compliance rules across onboarding and cases
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance rules apply to onboarding and monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how decision logs and evidence support audit-ready case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY manages risk-based routing and provider orchestration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer for VASPs, connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and case management into one structured workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal compliance rules, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and prepares reports to structure onboarding, monitoring and case workflows consistently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to create audit-ready records for compliance review and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from your existing providers into connected workflows without disrupting your current compliance stack or operational systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and structures their outputs into compliance workflows rather than replacing onboarding or screening tools.
final_title: Turn compliance rules into consistent workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures onboarding, monitoring and case workflows with audit-ready decision logs and provider-neutral rule enforcement.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
